description_long:
Auralane is pre-launch, and its site says only a little: the company is building a planning tool for product teams that aims to keep roadmaps, capacity, and decisions connected in one place. The product is in private beta behind a waitlist.

Beyond that one-line scope, the site offers no product detail — no description of how the tool works, no pricing, no team or customer information. It mentions being backed by investors without naming them, and notes it will be hiring soon. A fuller profile will have to wait until the company publishes more than a waitlist page.
